mapper.insert: INSERT INTO map_user (username, password, name, photo, phone, power, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{name}, #{photo}, #{phone}, #{power}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE map_user SET password = #{password}, name = #{name}, photo = #{photo}, phone = #{phone}, power = #{power}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}

UPDATE map_user SET deleted_at = NOW() WHERE id IN
#{user.id}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM map_user WHERE id = #{id} and deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT * FROM map_user
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.username}, '%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.name}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.phone}, '%')
AND power = #{conditions.power}
AND deleted_at IS NULL
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM map_user
AND username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.username}, '%')
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.name}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{conditions.phone}, '%')
AND power = #{conditions.power}
AND deleted_at IS NULL
